subjects.description: golden mature rice field ready for harvest
subjects.appearance_details: dense rows of ripe rice plants, heavy honey-gold grain heads, slender green-gold leaves, and wave-like movement across the field
subjects.relationship: central natural subject showing harvest season abundance
subjects.location: sprawling field stretching from foreground to horizon
subjects.relative_size: landscape-scale crop field filling nearly the entire frame
subjects.orientation: rice rows run diagonally into the distance, grain heads bowed by weight
subjects.pose: standing crop swaying together in the breeze
subjects.action: ripples in waves as wind passes over the mature grain and sunlight glints along the heads
subjects.state_changes: wind wave travels across the field; grain heads bend and rise; golden highlights move with the breeze
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: dry golden grain, flexible leaves, fine awns, and layered field texture

subjects.description: warm harvest sun over the rice fields
subjects.appearance_details: low golden sun, soft haze, long shadows between rows, and glowing highlights along ripened ears
subjects.relationship: lighting element that defines the harvest mood
subjects.location: upper background and reflected across the field surface
subjects.relative_size: small visible light source with large influence across the landscape
subjects.orientation: low in the sky, angled across the crop rows
subjects.action: casts amber light over the rice and makes the moving grains shimmer
subjects.state_changes: field glow deepens; haze brightens near the horizon; moving shadows sweep between rows
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: warm light, soft haze, and radiant sky color

background_setting: A vast expanse of golden rice fields at harvest time, with ripened grains stretching to the horizon, soft rural haze, faint field paths, and a warm sun bathing the crop in honey color.

lighting.conditions: Low warm sunlight with golden highlights, soft atmospheric haze, long gentle shadows, and shimmering reflections on the ripened grain heads.
lighting.direction: scene-appropriate key light from the most visible practical or natural source
lighting.shadows: soft scene-consistent shadows that ground subjects and objects
lighting.illumination_effect: Low warm sunlight with golden highlights, soft atmospheric haze, long gentle shadows, and shimmering reflections on the ripened grain heads.

aesthetics.composition: Harvest abundance, simple rural beauty, rhythmic crop motion, warm gold palette, calm seasonal atmosphere, and tactile grain detail.
aesthetics.color_scheme: colors follow the source prompt and scene materials
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Harvest abundance, simple rural beauty, rhythmic crop motion, warm gold palette, calm seasonal atmosphere, and tactile grain detail.

cinematography.camera_motion: Low field-level wide shot with slow dolly movement through the rice, shallow foreground detail, and visible wind waves crossing the crop surface.
cinematography.focus: main subject and key action remain sharp

artistic_style: Cinematic rural realism with rich golden color, gentle motion, and meditative harvest mood.
context: A mature rice field glows in late sunlight, its heavy grain heads swaying in the breeze and signaling the coming harvest.

actions.description: The camera opens low over a vast honey-gold rice field, showing mature grain heads bowed and ready for harvest.
A breeze crosses the field, making the ripened rice sway in broad wave-like motion under warm sunlight.
Golden highlights slide over the grain as the camera glides forward, ending on dense textured rice ears.

segments.description: Establish a sweeping golden rice field under warm sun, full of mature grain heads.
segments.key_changes: The field scale becomes clear and the first wind movement appears.
segments.camera: Low wide field-level shot with slow forward glide.

segments.description: Wind moves across the field, creating rolling waves through the ripened crop.
segments.key_changes: Rice heads bend together and sunlight shimmers across the moving surface.
segments.camera: Smooth lateral dolly just above the crop tops.

segments.description: Focus on close grain texture, heavy ears, and warm harvest glow.
segments.key_changes: The wide field resolves into detailed foreground rice and rich golden highlights.
segments.camera: Gentle push into close foreground rice with soft horizon blur.

temporal_caption: A mature golden rice field sways in warm sunlight, its heavy grain heads moving in harvest-season waves.
audio_description: Gentle wind through rice stalks, soft rustling grain, distant rural ambience, and a quiet open-field atmosphere.
